moments.title: The Open Championship Final Day
moments.blurb: The 154th Open Championship concludes today at Royal Birkdale, with the final round of golf's oldest major taking place.

angles.name: Final Round Excitement
angles.copy: It's Championship Sunday at Royal Birkdale! Who will lift the Claret Jug at The Open today? Every shot counts.

angles.name: Sunday Drama
angles.copy: The tension is building! It's the final day of The Open Championship. Who are you backing to make history at Royal Birkdale?

moments.title: Splendour Festival Concludes
moments.blurb: Nottingham's Splendour Festival wraps up today at Wollaton Hall & Deer Park, featuring a diverse lineup across five stages.

angles.name: Festival Finale
angles.copy: It's the final day of Splendour Festival in Nottingham! Who's soaking up the last of the festival vibes at Wollaton Hall?

angles.name: Nottingham Party
angles.copy: Splendour Festival goes out with a bang today! Hope everyone's had an amazing weekend of music in Nottingham.

moments.title: Brian May turns 79
moments.blurb: Queen's legendary guitarist Brian May celebrates his 79th birthday today, July 19th.

angles.name: Guitar Legend
angles.copy: Happy 79th birthday to the one and only Brian May! What's your favourite Queen guitar solo?

angles.name: Queen Icon
angles.copy: Sending birthday wishes to Queen legend Brian May, 79 today! A true rock icon and astrophysicist!

moments.title: Vikki Carr turns 85
moments.blurb: American pop and Latin ballad singer Vikki Carr, known for hits like 'It Must Be Him', celebrates her 85th birthday today.

angles.name: Pop Ballad Queen
angles.copy: Happy 85th birthday to the incredible Vikki Carr! Her voice on 'It Must Be Him' is simply timeless.

moments.title: Fred again.. turns 33
moments.blurb: Grammy-winning British DJ and producer Fred again.. celebrates his 33rd birthday today.

angles.name: Dance Music Star
angles.copy: Big birthday shout out to Fred again.., turning 33 today! What's your favourite track from the electronic maestro?

angles.name: Producer Extraordinaire
angles.copy: Happy 33rd to the incredibly talented Fred again..! From Boiler Room sets to chart-toppers, he's redefined electronic music.

moments.title: UK School Summer Holidays
moments.blurb: Summer holidays are now in full swing for schools across England, Wales and Scotland, with many breaking up this week.

angles.name: Schools Out
angles.copy: And just like that, summer holidays are here for many across the UK! What are your plans for the long break?

angles.name: Family Fun
angles.copy: School's out for summer! If you're looking for family fun ideas over the next few weeks, we've got you covered.

moments.title: Carlos Santana turns 79
moments.blurb: Legendary guitarist Carlos Santana celebrates his 79th birthday tomorrow, July 20th.

angles.name: Guitar God
angles.copy: Tomorrow, the incredible Carlos Santana turns 79! What's your go-to Santana track for those legendary guitar riffs?

angles.name: Timeless Talent
angles.copy: Get ready to wish Carlos Santana a very happy 79th birthday tomorrow! His influence on music is immeasurable.

moments.title: Kim Carnes turns 81
moments.blurb: Singer-songwriter Kim Carnes, famous for her iconic hit 'Bette Davis Eyes', celebrates her 81st birthday tomorrow.

angles.name: Bette Davis Eyes
angles.copy: Tomorrow, the unmistakable voice of Kim Carnes turns 81! 'Bette Davis Eyes' is still an absolute classic.

moments.title: John Lodge turns 83
moments.blurb: The Moody Blues bassist and vocalist John Lodge celebrates his 83rd birthday tomorrow.

angles.name: Moody Blues Legend
angles.copy: Wishing a very happy 83rd birthday to John Lodge of The Moody Blues tomorrow! What's your favourite track?

moments.title: Paul Cook turns 70
moments.blurb: Sex Pistols drummer Paul Cook celebrates his 70th birthday tomorrow, July 20th.

angles.name: Punk Icon
angles.copy: Tomorrow, Paul Cook of the Sex Pistols turns 70! A true punk pioneer.

moments.title: Mick MacNeil turns 68
moments.blurb: Simple Minds keyboardist Mick MacNeil celebrates his 68th birthday tomorrow.

angles.name: Simple Minds Sound
angles.copy: Happy 68th birthday to Simple Minds' Mick MacNeil tomorrow! His keys defined an era.

moments.title: Stone Gossard turns 60
moments.blurb: Pearl Jam guitarist Stone Gossard celebrates his 60th birthday tomorrow, July 20th.

angles.name: Grunge Guitarist
angles.copy: Wishing a rockin' 60th birthday to Pearl Jam's Stone Gossard tomorrow! What's your favourite PJ track?

moments.title: Damian Marley turns 48
moments.blurb: Jamaican reggae artist Damian 'Jr. Gong' Marley, Bob Marley's youngest son, celebrates his 48th birthday on July 21st.

angles.name: Reggae Royalty
angles.copy: Damian 'Jr. Gong' Marley turns 48 on Tuesday! What's your favourite track from the reggae superstar?

moments.title: Truck Festival Kicks Off
moments.blurb: Truck Festival returns to Hill Farm, Oxfordshire, from July 23-26, bringing indie and alternative music to the fields.

angles.name: Oxfordshire Festival
angles.copy: Truck Festival is back this Thursday! Get ready for a weekend of brilliant music in Oxfordshire. Who's heading there?

angles.name: Festival Countdown
angles.copy: The countdown to Truck Festival is on! Gates open Thursday for a weekend of indie anthems and good vibes.

moments.title: Latitude Festival Begins
moments.blurb: Latitude Festival, featuring music, arts, and comedy, starts Thursday, July 23rd, at Henham Park in Suffolk.

angles.name: Suffolk Summer
angles.copy: Latitude Festival kicks off in Suffolk on Thursday! Ready for a weekend of music, arts, and comedy in Henham Park?

angles.name: Festival Ready
angles.copy: Who's got their wellies ready for Latitude Festival? It all starts Thursday in Suffolk!

moments.title: Together Again Festival
moments.blurb: The Together Again Festival, a celebration of music, arts, and culture, takes place at Bolesworth Castle, Cheshire, from July 24-26.

angles.name: Cheshire Festival
angles.copy: Together Again Festival is happening this weekend at Bolesworth Castle! Who's ready for a weekend of music and good times?

angles.name: Weekend Vibes
angles.copy: Get set for the Together Again Festival in Cheshire, starting Friday! Three days of music and culture await.

moments.title: Darlene Love turns 85
moments.blurb: Rock and Roll Hall of Famer Darlene Love, known for her powerful vocals and hits like 'Christmas (Baby Please Come Home)', celebrates her 85th birthday on July 26th.

angles.name: Vocal Legend
angles.copy: On Sunday, the incredible Darlene Love turns 85! Her voice is pure magic.

moments.title: Mick Jagger turns 83
moments.blurb: The Rolling Stones' iconic frontman Mick Jagger celebrates his 83rd birthday on July 26th.

angles.name: Rock & Roll Icon
angles.copy: Can you believe it? Mick Jagger turns 83 on Sunday! What's your favourite Stones track to celebrate?

angles.name: Still Got The Moves
angles.copy: Happy 83rd birthday to the legendary Mick Jagger this Sunday! Still rocking stages worldwide.

moments.title: Roger Taylor turns 77
moments.blurb: Queen drummer Roger Taylor celebrates his 77th birthday on July 26th.

angles.name: Drumming Legend
angles.copy: Wishing a very happy 77th birthday to Queen's incredible drummer, Roger Taylor, on Sunday!

moments.title: Love Island UK Final
moments.blurb: The highly anticipated final of Love Island UK Season 13 airs live on Monday, July 27th, crowning the winning couple.

angles.name: Who Will Win?
angles.copy: It's the Love Island UK final on Monday! Who do you think will be crowned the winners of Season 13?

angles.name: Final Couple
angles.copy: Get ready for the ultimate showdown! The Love Island UK final is Monday, July 27th. Who's your favourite couple?

moments.title: Glasgow 2026 Commonwealth Games Begin
moments.blurb: The Glasgow 2026 Commonwealth Games officially open on Thursday, July 23rd, bringing top athletes to Scotland.

angles.name: Games Begin
angles.copy: The Commonwealth Games kick off in Glasgow this Thursday! Get ready for incredible sporting action from across the Commonwealth.

angles.name: Scotland Hosts
angles.copy: Glasgow is ready! The Commonwealth Games start Thursday, bringing the best athletes to Scotland. Which events are you most excited for?
